curatedTask.templates.account-project-re: Lime needs to know where things stand now.
Paste key metrics, result summaries, recent content performance, or current blockers
Clarify the goal for this review.
e.g. gain 10k followers this quarter, improve new-product conversion, publish steadily for 30 days
Carry forward this judgment and add a round of trend and opportunity windows worth following.
Carry forward this judgment and generate the most valuable next content plan.
The judgment summary returns to the current content and carries the next action back into Generate.
Judge the current goal, results, and next actions for content accounts, projects, and operations reviews.
curatedTask.templates.daily-trend-briefi: Narrow the platform, region, or language so trends stay focused.
e.g. X + TikTok (North America) or Xiaohongshu (Chinese)
Tell Lime which content lane you want to track today.
e.g. AI content creation, coffee brand collaborations, cross-border fashion
The trend briefing is written back into the current content so you can expand topics and drafts.
Collect current content trends, hot directions, and follow-up angles before you start the day.
curatedTask.templates.longform-multiplat: Provide the raw material; no need to organize it first.
Paste an article, meeting notes, document summary, or core excerpt
Tell Lime which platforms to prioritize this time.
e.g. X, LinkedIn, Xiaohongshu, WeChat Official Account
Turn into voiceover or short-video script
The multi-platform draft returns to the current content so you can keep organizing and splitting it.
Convert longform material into publish-ready versions without manually splitting titles and structure.
curatedTask.templates.recommendation.acc: Align to the result baseline “{{title}}” first, then decide the next move
curatedTask.templates.recommendation.dai: Use “{{title}}” as the baseline and keep looking for trend windows
curatedTask.templates.recommendation.soc: Turn “{{title}}” directly into the next draft
curatedTask.templates.script-to-voiceove: Start by giving Lime the original expression.
Paste the current script, copy, or text to turn into voiceover
Describe what it should sound like in one sentence.
e.g. 60-second talking head, short-video subtitles, livestream teaser
The voiceover and subtitle scripts are written back into the current content for shot planning, dubbing, or localization.
Make an existing script better for speaking and subtitles, including pauses, rhythm, and on-camera tone.
curatedTask.templates.social-post-starte: Use this for background, product benefits, or campaign positioning.
Enter the topic, product, campaign, or key facts you already have
Clarify who this piece is for.
e.g. consumer brand operators aged 25-35, or creators looking for AI editing tools
The first draft enters the current content so it can be rewritten or split across platforms.
Create an editable first draft around the audience, structure, and key information.
curatedTask.templates.viral-content-brea: Tell Lime which part you want to learn from.
e.g. learn the hook, reuse the structure, adapt it for a brand account
Lime needs to know which content to break down.
Paste a link, title, body text, or key summary
The breakdown is saved into the current content so you can quickly recreate your version.
Turn a high-performing piece into hooks, pacing, material tactics, and reusable patterns.
